testcase.name: shouldGetNotificationById
testcase.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\rafae\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.14.13\byte-buddy-agent-1.14.13.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: shouldHandleInternalErrorOnGetNotification

com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- Error getting notification java.lang.RuntimeException: Repository crash at testcase.name: shouldHandleBatchSendWithMixOfSuccessAndFailure
testcase.system-out: 14:03:46.215 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC BatchSend stream started 14:03:46.311 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- BatchSend completed: sent=2, failed=1

testcase.name: shouldHandleMultipleMonitorRequests
testcase.system-out: 14:03:46.321 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC MonitorNotifications stream started 14:03:46.323 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- MonitorNotifications stream completed

testcase.name: shouldRejectEmptyTemplateId
testcase.system-out: 14:03:46.328 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC SendNotification called: recipientId=USER-001, channel=EMAIL 14:03:46.328 [main] WARN com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- Invalid notification request: template_id is required

testcase.name: shouldRejectUnspecifiedChannel
testcase.system-out: 14:03:46.340 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC SendNotification called: recipientId=USER-001, channel=NOTIFICATION_CHANNEL_UNSPECIFIED 14:03:46.340 [main] WARN com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- Invalid notification request: channel is required

testcase.name: shouldCountFailuresInBatchSend

testcase.name: shouldHandleEmptyBatchSend
testcase.system-out: 14:03:46.356 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC BatchSend stream started 14:03:46.356 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- BatchSend completed: sent=0, failed=0

testcase.name: shouldHandleMonitorNotificationsBidirectionalStream
testcase.system-out: 14:03:46.359 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC MonitorNotifications stream started 14:03:46.360 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- MonitorNotifications stream completed

testcase.name: shouldRejectEmptyRecipientId
testcase.system-out: 14:03:46.362 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC SendNotification called: recipientId=, channel=EMAIL 14:03:46.363 [main] WARN com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- Invalid notification request: recipient_id is required

testcase.name: shouldHandleBatchSendStream
testcase.system-out: 14:03:46.366 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC BatchSend stream started 14:03:46.367 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- BatchSend completed: sent=3, failed=0

testcase.name: shouldHandleMonitorWithNonExistentNotification
testcase.system-out: 14:03:46.370 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC MonitorNotifications stream started 14:03:46.371 [main] WARN com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- Notification not found in monitor: INVALID 14:03:46.371 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- MonitorNotifications stream completed

testcase.name: shouldMapAllChannels
testcase.system-out: 14:03:46.374 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC SendNotification called: recipientId=USER-001, channel=EMAIL 14:03:46.374 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC SendNotification called: recipientId=USER-001, channel=SMS 14:03:46.375 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC SendNotification called: recipientId=USER-001, channel=PUSH 14:03:46.376 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC SendNotification called: recipientId=USER-001, channel=WHATSAPP

testcase.name: shouldSendNotificationSuccessfully
testcase.system-out: 14:03:46.380 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC SendNotification called: recipientId=USER-001, channel=EMAIL

testcase.name: shouldMapAllPriorities
testcase.system-out: 14:03:46.383 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC SendNotification called: recipientId=USER-001, channel=EMAIL 14:03:46.385 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC SendNotification called: recipientId=USER-001, channel=EMAIL 14:03:46.386 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC SendNotification called: recipientId=USER-001, channel=EMAIL 14:03:46.387 [main] INFO com.example.notification.grpc.NotificationGrpcService -- gRPC SendNotification called: recipientId=USER-001, channel=EMAIL
